name: Belgian Stonewashed Linen
description: A beautifully relaxed, stonewashed linen with exceptional drape and a lived-in texture. Ideal for shirts, trousers, and outerwear. One of our most consistently requested naturals.

name: Organic Merino Wool
description: Super-fine 18.5 micron merino, certified organic, from a renowned Biella mill. Incredibly soft handle with excellent recovery. Suited to tailoring, knitwear, and precision-cut separates.

name: GOTS Organic Poplin
description: A crisp, lightweight organic cotton poplin. Excellent colour-fastness and a refined, smooth hand. Ideal for shirts, dresses, and precision-cut styles.

name: Japanese Hemp Canvas
description: A robust yet refined hemp canvas with a slightly nubby texture. Naturally antibacterial and UV-resistant. Perfect for bags, outerwear, and structured garments.

name: Peace Silk Charmeuse
description: Ahimsa (peace) silk — produced without harming the silkworm. A luminous charmeuse with a fluid drape and subtle sheen. Exceptional for eveningwear and soft tailoring.

name: Irish Medium-Weight Linen
description: A classic medium-weight Irish linen with a clean, structured hand. Heritage production with traceable fibre sourcing. Suited to tailoring, interiors, and premium workwear.

name: Turkish Terry Towelling
description: Plush, double-sided terry towelling in certified organic cotton. A signature fabric for contemporary loungewear, resort collections, and accessories.

name: Regenerative Boiled Wool
description: Boiled wool from regeneratively farmed Austrian sheep. Dense, felted structure with extraordinary warmth-to-weight ratio. Iconic for structured coats and jackets.

name: Mycelium Leather
description: Grown from mushroom mycelium, this leather alternative offers a supple, pliable surface with a distinctive organic texture. Fully biodegradable. Suited to accessories, bags, and footwear uppers.

name: Algae-Based Jersey
description: A smooth, lightweight jersey knit derived from seaweed biopolymers. Naturally antimicrobial, fully compostable. A pioneering choice for activewear and jersey basics.

name: Recycled Ocean Nylon
description: ECONYL® regenerated nylon recovered from ocean plastic, ghost nets, and landfill waste. High performance, exceptional lustre. Ideal for swimwear, activewear, and linings.

name: Bio-Based PET Woven
description: A crisp woven fabric made from plant-based PET derived from sugarcane. Drop-in replacement for conventional polyester with a 70% lower carbon footprint.

name: Tencel™ Lyocell Twill
description: Tencel™ lyocell in a fine twill weave. Exceptionally soft, moisture-wicking, and produced in a closed-loop solvent process. Versatile for workwear, casualwear, and dresses.

name: Pineapple Fibre Non-Woven
description: Piñatex® — a natural textile made from pineapple leaf fibres, a by-product of the pineapple harvest. Textural, distinctive surface ideal for footwear, bags, and accessories.

name: Recycled Cashmere Knit
description: Post-consumer cashmere, collected and re-spun in Prato, Italy's recycled textile hub. All the luxurious softness of virgin cashmere, with a fraction of the environmental cost.

name: Hemp-Organic Cotton Blend
description: A 55% hemp, 45% organic cotton blend with a beautiful texture that softens with each wash. Increasingly popular for premium denim-weight applications.

name: Selvedge Denim
description: A rare find — 340m of 14oz raw selvedge denim from Kaihara, one of Japan's most revered denim mills. Rich indigo, tight weave, and a beautiful natural slub. For serious denim designers only.

name: Italian Double-Faced Wool
description: 85m of double-faced wool from VBC's archive collection. Midnight navy one side, camel the other. An extraordinary fabric for a limited coat run.

name: French Jacquard Brocade
description: 120m of a discontinued jacquard brocade from a storied Lyon mill. Floral pattern in dusty rose and gold on an ivory ground. Exceptional for eveningwear and statement pieces.

name: Portuguese Corduroy
description: 220m of fine-wale cotton corduroy in a warm forest green. Dense, well-constructed pile with excellent colour vibrancy. Ideal for trousers, jackets, and accessories.

name: Deadstock Silk Satin
description: 180m of a soft, champagne-toned silk satin with an exceptional drape. Archive stock from a premium mill. Available in a single colour — once it's gone, it's gone.

name: Deadstock Technical Nylon
description: 400m of a matte, lightweight nylon ripstop in black. Originally produced for a large sportswear brand. Excellent construction, versatile for outerwear, bags, and technical garments.

name: Merino Flannel Archive
description: Soft, brushed merino flannel from a Yorkshire mill's archive. Classic charcoal grey with a fine herringbone weave. 160m remaining. A rare chance to work with a storied British fabric.

name: Organic Cotton Gauze
description: 350m of delicate double gauze in organic cotton. An airy, open weave with beautiful translucency. Perfect for summer dresses, blouses, and layering pieces.
